title: Rail Navigation
description: A vertical navigation rail with multiple visual looks and start/end locations. Supports active/disabled items and optional suffix content.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: An example of creating a side menu using ax-rail-navigation.

sections.title: Looks
sections.description: Explore different visual styles for the rail navigation component including default, pills, pills-color, with-line, and with-line-color looks.

sections.title: States
sections.description: Demonstrate active and disabled states of rail navigation items with interactive controls.

sections.title: Locations
sections.description: Show different placement options for the rail navigation on the left or right side of the container.

sections.title: Service
sections.description: Demonstrate programmatic control of rail navigation using the AXRailNavigationService.

types.title: AXRailNavigationComponent
types.description: The main component for rail navigation.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: location
props.description: Side of the container where the rail is placed.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when a component option changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

types.title: AXRailNavigationItemComponent
types.description: Individual navigation item within the rail navigation.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: href
props.description: Anchor href when used as a link.

props.name: routerLinkActiveOptions
props.description: Options for router link active matching.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when a component option changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onClick
events.description: Emitted when the item is clicked.

events.name: activeChange
events.description: Emitted when the active state changes.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

types.title: AXRailNavigationService
types.description: Service that manages the active state of rail navigation items.

props.name: activeItem$
props.description: Observable that emits the currently active rail navigation item.

methods.content:
/**
 * Sets the specified item as the active rail navigation item.
 * @param item - The rail navigation item to set as active
 */
setActive(item: AXRailNavigationItemComponent): void
